short_form_scripts.hook: Your landlord hasn't returned your deposit in 30 days?
short_form_scripts.body: Most states require your deposit back in 14 to 30 days. After that? They're breaking the law. But arguing over text won't work. What does work is a formal demand letter with your state's exact deadline and penalty laws.
short_form_scripts.cta: Go to Deposits-Back.com. Answer a few quick questions. We generate your legal demand letter in 60 seconds. Just $19.99, no signup, no subscription. Link in bio.
